title: Interposing Relay Price in Pakistan 2026 — Control Relay, PLC Interface Relay & Signal Relay Complete Buyer Guide
summary_html: Complete 2026 price guide for interposing relays, control relays, and PLC interface relays in Pakistan. SPDT 8A, 16A, 4CO relay modules, sockets, SSR prices in PKR. Pakistan MCC, PLC panel, fire alarm, and industrial control panel selection guide. 8A SPDT relay + socket from Rs. 260. 16A 4CO relay complete from Rs. 720. 24VDC coil selection, SSR Pakistan risks, fire alarm interface wiring, and 7 common Pakistan panel wiring mistakes.
